text: The sterile corridors outside contrast sharply with the vivid, conceptual space inside. The blue-pink glow and the large 'R+D' letters make me feel as though I’ve stepped into an experimental lab of thought; a place dedicated to the unending pursuit of understanding. The disjointed presence of others, seeming thoughtful and briefly blurred, makes me feel both companioned and solitary—a reminder of the individual journey within collective inquiry. I feel curious, alert, ready to engage my mind with whatever strange ideas might be found on these walls.
